best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-compito-001 title: create compito module: compito source pages: 4,6 preconditions: coordinator is authenticated. test data: - compito name: new task - description: description of the task - region: region - province: province - city: city - active: true test steps: 1. click "inserisci emergenza". 2. verify that the coordinator is authenticated. 3. enter the compito details. 4. click "crea emergenza". 5. verify that the compito is created successfully. expected result: compito is created and displayed in the system.

test case id: tc-emergenza-001 title: view emergenza module: emergenza source pages: 5,8 preconditions: coordinator is authenticated. test data: - emergenza id: 1 test steps: 1. click "visualizza emergenza". 2. verify that the coordinator is authenticated. 3. select the emergenza. 4. verify that the emergenza details are displayed. expected result: emergenza details are displayed.
